meta.pageDescription: Scope a mobile or installable app build—stacks, auth, stores, and ASO. Indicative pricing only; final quotes after discovery.
meta.heroSubtitle: Bioluminescent ticket lane for app builds: stack the caps you need on one glowing stem—still not a final quote, just spore-print hints until discovery locks the forest map.
meta.stickyDisclaimer: Indicative pricing only. Final quotes depend on platforms, backend, compliance, and store timelines. Prices change; this page may lag.
meta.longDisclaimer: Totals on this page are not binding. Developer program fees, store review outcomes, third-party SDKs, and infra are usually billed to you directly unless we agree otherwise in writing. Selecting items does not create an obligation for either party.
meta.mailSubject: À la carte app build — scope from portfolio

questionnaire.title: Phase 1 — app context
questionnaire.description: Optional, but helps the first call land in the right biome.

options.label: Consumer / fans
options.description: Public app stores or sideload trials.

options.label: Internal ops / field
options.description: MDM, enterprise tracks, or private distribution.

options.label: iOS first
options.description: Android later or not in v1.

options.label: Must work offline
options.description: Cache, sync, or local-first is central.

options.label: ASAP prototype
options.description: Cut scope to ship a slice.

items.label: Flutter (Dart)
items.description: Cross-platform UI with Material/Cupertino; one codebase for mobile (+ web/desktop if scoped).

priceHint.basis: Scales with screens, state, and plugin depth.

items.label: React Native / Expo
items.description: JavaScript/TypeScript mobile app with native modules when needed; Expo workflow when it fits.

priceHint.basis: Native bridges and complex nav add time.

items.label: PWA + native shell (Capacitor-class)
items.description: Web app wrapped for store listing with plugins for push, camera, etc.—not a substitute for heavy native UI.

priceHint.basis: Store compliance and plugin gaps move the quote.

items.label: Thin native shell + WebView
items.description: Loads your existing responsive web inside a minimal app for store presence—fastest when the web app is already strong.

priceHint.basis: Deep integrations still need native code.

categories.label: Architecture
categories.description: How the client handles connectivity and data locally.

items.label: Online-first
items.description: Standard network calls; friendly errors when offline.

priceHint.basis: Included in stack estimate unless you add heavy caching.

items.label: Offline & sync sketch
items.description: Local persistence outline, conflict strategy notes, background sync hooks—discovery locks the real model.

priceHint.basis: CRDTs and multi-device sync are custom.

items.label: Local-only prototype
items.description: No backend in v1: on-device data, export/import, or fixture-driven demos.

priceHint.basis: Promotion to production backend is a new phase.

categories.label: Backend & data
categories.description: Pick how the app talks to data.

items.label: No backend in scope
items.description: Static config, local storage, or bundled assets only.

priceHint.basis: Shifts when you add APIs later.

items.label: REST / GraphQL to your API
items.description: Typed client, auth headers, error handling, and generated or hand models as agreed.

priceHint.basis: Endpoint count and pagination complexity matter.

items.label: Firebase (Auth, Firestore, or similar)
items.description: Google Firebase-shaped client: rules awareness, offline cache where applicable.

priceHint.basis: Blaze plans and third-party quotas pass through.

items.label: Supabase (Auth + Postgres client)
items.description: Supabase-flavored auth and data access with RLS-friendly patterns in the app.

priceHint.basis: Edge functions and heavy realtime add scope.

items.label: No auth (guest / local)
items.description: No accounts; optional device-only IDs.

priceHint.basis: Revisit when you need accounts.

items.label: Email magic link / password
items.description: Classic email flows with your provider or Firebase/Supabase auth.

priceHint.basis: MFA and risky flows add review time.

items.label: OAuth (social login)
items.description: One or more IdPs (e.g. Google, GitHub) via your stack’s OAuth patterns.

priceHint.basis: Each extra provider adds config and QA.

items.label: Apple + Google sign-in (store-friendly)
items.description: The usual App Store pairing: Sign in with Apple plus Google where policy allows.

priceHint.basis: Account linking and edge cases add scope.

items.label: iOS internal / TestFlight wiring
items.description: Certs, profiles, build flavor, and first TestFlight upload notes—Apple dev account on you.

priceHint.basis: $99/yr Apple program billed to you.

items.label: Android internal / Play tracks
items.description: Signing config, internal testing track, and rollout checklist—Play account on you.

priceHint.basis: Play fees and policy changes pass through.

items.label: Store listing prep (both platforms)
items.description: Screenshots template alignment, description drafts, content rating questionnaires outline—graphics finalization may be separate.

priceHint.basis: Per store if split; localization extra.

items.label: Crash reporting (e.g. Sentry-style)
items.description: SDK wiring, release mapping, and symbol upload notes—vendor subscription on you.

priceHint.basis: Multi-flavor builds add setup.

items.label: Product analytics events
items.description: Event taxonomy doc, client hooks, and privacy-minded defaults—vendor choice in discovery.

priceHint.basis: Attribution / MMP integration is separate.

items.label: Push notifications sketch
items.description: FCM/APNs wiring outline, permission UX, and payload patterns—backend worker scope may be extra.

priceHint.basis: Rich media and topic fan-out add time.

items.label: Deep links / app links
items.description: Universal links and Android App Links verification checklist with your domains.

priceHint.basis: Multi-domain or deferred deep links custom.

categories.label: Compliance & privacy
categories.description: Store and user-trust scaffolding—not legal advice.

items.label: Privacy labels & data inventory assist
items.description: Questionnaire walkthrough aligned to App Store / Play privacy forms from the implemented SDK list.

priceHint.basis: Lawyer review still recommended for regulated data.

items.label: Permissions UX copy & flows
items.description: Pre-permission screens, settings deep links, and rationale strings tuned for review.

priceHint.basis: Sensitive APIs (health, location bg) add scope.

items.label: Fastlane-style lane sketch
items.description: Lanes for beta vs release, env files, and match/cert notes as fits your stack.

priceHint.basis: Monorepos and signing chaos add hours.

items.label: CI build (lint + assemble)
items.description: GitHub Actions (or similar) to build PRs and artifacts—no full device farm.

priceHint.basis: iOS runners or self-hosted Mac adds cost.

items.label: E2E smoke harness
items.description: A handful of critical-path flows (e.g. login, checkout) with Maestro/Detox-class tooling—bounded count.

priceHint.basis: Flaky tests mean timeboxed stabilization.

categories.label: ASO & discovery (apps)
categories.description: Store search and conversion—not web SEO (see website à la carte for that).

items.label: Keyword & subtitle strategy
items.description: Competitor-aware keyword map, subtitle options, and avoidance of obvious policy traps.

priceHint.basis: Per locale bundle adds time.

items.label: Screenshot narrative & feature order
items.description: Wireframe of the first five slides, value prop ordering, and caption beats—design execution can be separate.

priceHint.basis: Full visual design or 3D mockups extra.

items.label: Store localization pass (1–2 locales)
items.description: Translate-ready strings pack + store metadata checklist for an extra market—translation vendor optional.

priceHint.basis: Each extra language adds review.
